Appearances on WED-FEB-06-2013:
Plaintiff 370 ELLIS, LP is represented by Darry Deal who is present with Attorney
Daniel Stern
Defendant WILL EARL DANIELS is present with Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli Representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case does not settle. The trial date of FEB-11-2013 remains on calendar.
